summary: Iteration 74 - All 8 features tested successfully: Cash Book 4 action cards, PV Payment dialog in Cash Book, Purchase Vouchers Cash/Bank mode + Undo, Sale Book Opening Balance removed, Sale Voucher creation bug fixed, Sale Book checkboxes work, Cash Book Sale Voucher Payment dialog works.
seed_data_creation: Created test purchase voucher (Test Supplier PV) to verify payment dialog and undo functionality. Cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 changes from this iteration verified: 1) Cash Book has 4 action cards at top (Bank Accounts indigo, Sale Voucher Payment emerald, Purchase Voucher Payment orange, Set Opening Balance purple). 2) Cash Book Purchase Voucher Payment dialog (data-testid='pv-payment-dialog') works with voucher selection and Cash/Bank mode. 3) Purchase Vouchers page payment dialog has Cash/Bank selector (data-testid='pv-pay-account') and bank dropdown (data-testid='pv-pay-bank'). 4) Payment History dialog shows Undo button (data-testid='pv-undo-{idx}') only for voucher payments, not for advance entries. 5) Sale Book Opening Balance button removed. 6) Sale voucher creation works (KeyError 'id' bug fixed).

Purchase Voucher Payment card (orange) visible
Set Opening Balance card (purple) visible
All 4 cards arranged in grid at top of Cash Book

Bank (बैंक) option available
Bank account dropdown appears when Bank selected
Bank payment API works with bank_name parameter
Payment History dialog opens from history button
Voucher payments show Undo button (can_undo=true)
Advance entries do NOT show Undo button (correct behavior)
POST /api/voucher-payment/undo deletes cash, ledger, local_party entries
Voucher balance restored after undo
Opening Balance button NOT present in Sale Book toolbar
Only PDF, Excel, New Sale buttons visible
Opening Balance managed via Cash Book Set Opening Balance card
Sale voucher creation returns 200/201 (not 500 KeyError)
Response includes id, voucher_no, total, balance
Line 278 fix: changed d['id'] to doc_id
Select-all checkbox visible in Sale Book table header
Individual row checkboxes visible
POST /api/sale-book/delete-bulk works correctly
Sale Voucher Payment dialog opens from Cash Book card
Voucher dropdown shows pending sale vouchers
Payment Mode selector with Cash/Bank options
Payment recorded correctly via POST /api/voucher-payment
